backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor with no functionality; backend is unused as the app is entirely client-side.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the 5-second loading state with sequential messages ('optimising your device' and 'generating sensitivity for your device') in DeviceNameScreen.tsx before displaying the sensitivity popup.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files describing authentication flow, passkey validation, device name input with loading states, sensitivity popup with random Brazilian values, and styling configuration.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining light and dark mode color variables for background, foreground, accent, and other UI elements with pure black background theme.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with 'ENZOxSENSI' title, root div for React mounting, and module script loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main application component managing authentication state, screen transitions between PasskeyScreen and DeviceNameScreen, and SensitivityPopup display with header (skull logo and ENZOxSENSI branding) and footer (caffeine.ai attribution).
frontend/src/components/DeviceNameScreen: Device name input form with '100% headshot rate' badge that triggers a 5-second loading state showing sequential messages ('optimising your device' at 0-2.5s, 'generating sensitivity for your device' at 2.5-5s) before calling onGenerate to display the sensitivity popup.
frontend/src/components/PasskeyScreen.ts: Passkey entry form with instant client-side validation for 'enzonvrfall' passkey, error display on incorrect entry, and Instagram follow note ('enzo.nvr.fall') for passkey access.
frontend/src/components/SensitivityPopup: Modal dialog displaying randomly generated Brazilian sensitivity values (General, Red Dot, 2x, 4x ranging 50-200) using useMemo with isOpen dependency to regenerate fresh values each time the popup opens.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook for creating and managing ICP backend actor instances with Internet Identity authentication, query invalidation on identity changes, and anonymous actor fallback.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication with AuthClient integration, login/logout functionality, identity persistence, and status tracking (initializing, idle, logging-in, success, loginError).
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Intentionally empty placeholder file as the application uses only client-side logic with no backend queries required.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for a comprehensive design system with light/dark mode support, including colors for UI elements (background, foreground, primary, secondary, etc.), sidebar, and chart components using OKLCH color space.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app with QueryClient for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication, mounting to the root DOM element.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that extends the default theme with custom colors mapped to CSS variables (using OKLCH color space), border radius utilities, custom animations for accordions, and includes typography, container queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state document describing ENZOxSENSI, a mobile app with passkey authentication ('enzonvrfall') that generates random Brazilian sensitivity settings (capped at 200) for gaming devices after a 5-second loading state with optimization messages.
